rationale: Educ. Code §29.906 governs character education program requirements for school districts. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The State Board of Education shall integrate positive character traits and personal skills into the essential knowledge and skills adopted for kindergarten through grade 12, as appropriate.
_note: Rule text concerns character education; proposed change concerns homestead exemption. No overlap.
